# Upstream dependency

- Repository: https://github.com/dominhok/pptx-visual-proofreader
- Vendored commit: `2d26145`
- Included paths: `SKILL.md`, `agents/`, `references/`, and `scripts/`

This dependency is vendored so archive-based Codex skill installation includes the
layout linter and card-crop renderer. A separately installed sibling skill with the
same name takes precedence during development.
